guest.headline: Keep your recipes.
guest.body: You're using RecipeGen without an account. Add an email + password and everything you've created stays attached. Guests are also limited to 10 recipes and can't browse or publish to the community library.

subscription.freeBody: Upgrade to Pantry Pro for unlimited recipes, unlimited AI, and waste-risk warnings on shopping lists.

alerts.restoredBody: Your subscription is active again. The rest of the app may take a few seconds to refresh.
alerts.nothingBody: No past purchase was found on this Apple ID. If you bought RecipeGen on a different Apple ID, switch to it in iPhone Settings → Apple ID and try again.
alerts.inactiveBody: We found a past purchase but it isn't currently active. If your subscription is on a different RecipeGen account, sign out and sign in to that account, then try Restore again.
alerts.manageUnavailableBody: Try again in a moment, or relaunch the app.

profile.hint: Shown next to public recipes you publish.

household.label: How many you're cooking for
household.hint: Used to scale recipes and shopping lists. Adults + kids both count.

language.label: App language
language.hint: Recipes you create or save keep their original language. Changes the chrome only.

alerts.endGuestBody: Your guest data stays on the server but you won't be able to reach it from this device. To keep it, save your account first.

blocked.emptyHint: Block authors from any public recipe's "⋯" menu.

alerts.confirmBody: Their public recipes will appear in Discover again.

reports.emptyHint: Reports show up here once you file one from any public recipe's "⋯" menu.

alerts.withdrawBody: We'll remove this report from review. You can re-submit later if needed.

dangerZone.guestBody: Permanently delete this guest session and every recipe, plan, and pantry item under it. This can't be undone.
dangerZone.userBody: Permanently delete your account and everything stored under it. This can't be undone.

alerts.deleteStartBody: This permanently removes your account, recipes, plans, pantry, grocery lists, and cook history. This cannot be undone.

deleteModal.body: Once you tap Delete below, your account and everything stored under it is gone for good.
deleteModal.mismatchBody: Account NOT deleted. Type DELETE in all caps to confirm.
deleteModal.noEmailError: Could not verify your account — sign out and back in, then try again.
